apps.name: Paint
apps.desc: Touch drawing app with pen, eraser, fill bucket, colour picker, adjustable size, undo/redo, and save as PNG.

apps.name: Habit Tracker
apps.desc: Track daily habits with streaks and a 30-day history grid. Up to 10 custom habits. Saved locally.

apps.name: Pomodoro
apps.desc: Focus timer with work/break cycles, session counter, customisable durations and audio alert.

apps.name: Budget
apps.desc: Personal budget tracker. Log income and expenses by category, see your balance and totals. Saved locally.

apps.name: Flashcards
apps.desc: Flip cards study tool with multiple decks and spaced-repetition scoring. Create your own cards. Saved locally.

apps.name: Unit Converter
apps.desc: Convert length, weight, temperature, speed, area, volume, time and data. Fully offline.

apps.name: Reddit
apps.desc: Browse Reddit — home feed, subreddits, posts and comments. Sort by Hot, New, Top, Rising.

apps.name: Hacker News
apps.desc: Browse Hacker News — top stories, new, ask, show, jobs. Powered by the official HN API.

apps.name: Weather
apps.desc: Current conditions, hourly forecasts, and 7-day outlook for any city. No API key needed.

apps.name: Wikipedia
apps.desc: Search, browse featured articles, explore topics. Supports 10 languages.

apps.name: Minesweeper
apps.desc: Classic Minesweeper with 3 difficulty levels, timer, and flag support.
Slide tiles to combine them and reach 2048! Swipe or arrow keys. Undo and best score.

apps.name: Relaxing Tangle
apps.desc: A relaxing tangle puzzle. Draw lines, untangle the nodes, find your zen.
